# Chapter 2: Requirements and specification  (~100 pp)
- 2.1 Why requirements precede design (12) · 2.2 Eliciting requirements (15) · 2.3 Functional vs non-functional requirements (12) · 2.4 Specifications: how precise is precise enough (15) · 2.5 Requirements traceability (12) · 2.6 Verification and validation distinguished (12) · 2.7 Requirements as a conflict-management tool (12) · 2.8 Failure section: missed, ambiguous, or self-contradictory requirements (10)

**Archetype**: balance, ethics. **Project**: write a requirements document for one project from the reader's notebook; review against an evaluation rubric. **Exercises**: 25.
